caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, positioned in front of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs. He wears a distinctive, tall, pointed grey wig, glasses, and large black headphones. His outfit consists of a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, and a small red bow tie. A black microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. The logo "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears on the left and right sides of the screen. In the background, some clothing items and a white folder are visible. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth opening and closing as he talks. By the end of the clip, he raises his right hand toward his chest, gesturing as he continues to speak. The background and equipment remain stationary throughout the scene.
